# SudoLang with Markdown

This is a markdown document with embedded SudoLang code.

## Introduction

SudoLang is a powerful language for AI collaboration.

## Code Example

```
function processData(input) {
  // Process the input
  $result = input |> filter |> map
  return $result
}
```

## Variables

We can use variables like $myVar and $count in our code.

### Commands

Use commands like /help and /ask to interact with the AI.

## Interface Definition

User {
  name: string
  email: string
  age: number
}

## Conclusion

This demonstrates markdown integration with SudoLang syntax.
